name: Creamy Fennel Soup
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Defatted beef or chicken stock (or bouillon from cubes)
1 tbsp lemon juice (or more to taste)
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean and slice the fennel bulb, reserving any greens for garnish.
2. Cook the fennel in the stock with the garlic and shallots until soft.
3. Puree in a blender with the lemon juice and zest, and the spices.
4. Strain the puree if you wish a smoother texture (optional).
5. Combine well with the yogurt and chill.
6. Serve garnished with chopped fennel greens or chopped coriander.
Serves six.
